movie.actors: John Travolta, Kirstie Alley, David Gallagher, Tabitha Lupien
movie.plot: In this, the third film, it's the pets who do the talking. The Ubriacco's find themselves the owners of two dogs, Rocks, a street wise cross breed, and Daphne, a spoiled pedigree poodle. ...
movie.title: Look Who's Talking Now
movie.writer: Tom Ropelewski, Leslie Dixon, Amy Heckerling (characters)
